stories.title: Messi has no equals, and if not for him, Argentina...
stories.summary: Argentina's unbelievable comeback win over Egypt on Tuesday was all down to Lionel Messi, who is seemingly dragging his team to another final.

stories.title: Argentina, Messi complete epic comeback with VAR d...
stories.summary: Argentina muscled their way past Egypt in a game that had everything: Messi magic, VAR drama, underdog brilliance and another unforgettable World Cup moment.

stories.title: Wiz reunite with Mavs' Middleton in sign-and-trade...
stories.summary: The Washington Wizards are bringing back veteran Khris Middleton on a three-year, $17.6 million contract via a sign-and-trade deal, his agent told ESPN's Shams Charania.

stories.title: Messi saves Argentina in dramatic win over Egypt
stories.summary: Lionel Messi scored in a record sixth straight World Cup knockout match to help Argentina reach the quarterfinals with a stunning late comeback to beat Egypt 3-2 in Atlanta.

stories.title: Egypt bemoan 'injustice' after Argentina defeat
stories.summary: Hossam Hassan said Egypt were the victim of an "injustice" in their 3-2 World Cup defeat against Argentina due to FIFA wanting Lionel Messi to "stay in the running."
